name: Moishe Oysher
abstract: Moishe Oysher (Yiddish: משה אוישער) (March 8, 1906 – November 27, 1958) was an American cantor, recording artist, and film and Yiddish theatre actor. During the 1940s and 1950s he was one of the top Hazzans and his recordings continue to be appreciated due to his rich, powerful voice and creative arrangements.

about_quotes.speaker: Hentoff Nat
about_quotes.evidence: Steven Bernstein and Sam Rivers ... transcribe some of the recordings of the leading chazans, the leading cantors – Yossele Rosenblatt, Moishe Oysher
about_quotes.doc_title: Hentoff Nat — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
